title: senecio aquariensis
intro: Senecio aquariensis, also known as the water senecio or water groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural laxative and diuretic due to its high content of anthraquinone glycosides. These properties can provide various health benefits, such as relieving constipation and improving kidney function. The plant is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or dried extract for use in herbal remedies, and should be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare practitioner.
